labels: enhancement, needs-review

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## 🎯 Problem/Use Case
<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it addresses -->

## 💭 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented -->

## 🔄 User Flow
<!-- Describe how users would interact with this feature -->

1. User navigates to...
2. User clicks/taps...
3. System displays...
4. User can then...

## 🎨 Design Considerations
<!-- Any UI/UX considerations or mockups -->

## 🏗️ Technical Considerations
<!-- Technical requirements, constraints, or implementation notes -->

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Specific requirements for this feature -->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues or dependencies -->

## 📱 Platform Priority
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Both (required)

## 📊 Priority Level
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (should have)
- [ ] High (must have)
- [ ] Critical (blocking)
